news.title: Isle of Eline — racing update in the works
news.body: AI rivals that drive your car, Gran Turismo-style performance points, race replays with a cinematic camera, a best-lap ghost and an online lap-time leaderboard are all coming to the island.

games.title: Isle of Eline
games.description: Race, build and grow on your own solarpunk island. Drive the VS Lens and four tiers of Chaos-physics cars, race AI rivals that learn your lines, watch cinematic replays, buy land, build a sea-to-fuel industry chain and watch the island city grow around you.

files.title: Example Beta Build
files.description: Replace with a real gated download. Point repo at a PRIVATE repo — only GitHub users you invite as collaborators can see and download its release assets.
